positioning.buyer: Product, partnerships, revenue, or growth leader at a wallet, exchange, or web3 app
positioning.trigger: The team wants embedded buy, sell, or spend flows without leaking users into third-party redirects or stitching multiple vendors together
positioning.wedge: one embedded payment layer across buy, sell, and spend
boundary: not only a single on-ramp widget vendor

proof.strongest_claim: Mercuryo is trusted by 500+ leading web3 companies and reports 12M+ KYCd users
support: Partner logos including MetaMask, Trust Wallet, Ledger, and others

open_questions: Should Mercuryo lead with the broader payment-engine story or with On-Ramp on first touch?
Which segment has the highest urgency today: wallets, exchanges, or broader dApps?
Is Spend part of the main story or the strongest expansion layer after On-Ramp adoption?
next_actions: Test a homepage narrative focused on keeping users in-product across buy, sell, and spend
Audit sales calls to see which product and buyer combination closes fastest
Reduce vague gateway language and replace it with concrete embedded-payment outcomes
